"'''Out of the Cradle'''" is a short story by [[Patricia A. Jackson]] inspired by an [[RPGA]] tournament Patricia participated in with [[Peter M. Schweighofer]], editor of the ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]''.<ref name="Rooqoo">{{WordPress|subdomain=roqoodepot|url=interviews/interview-with-patricia-a-jackson/|name=Rooqoo Depot|text=Interview with Patricia A. Jackson|archivedate=20211206034126}}</ref> It was published in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 2|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 2]] by [[West End Games]] in [[May]] [[1994]].

==Plot summary==
Against the wishes of his [[Parent/Legends|father]], fifteen-[[Standard year/Legends|year]]-old [[Drake Paulsen]] is forced to serve as a [[Navigator/Legends|navigator]] aboard a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] at the behest of a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Gangster/Legends|gangster]] at [[Socorro/Legends|Socorro]]. Drake is aboard the ''[[Seldom Different]]'', a ship that will serve as a decoy to [[Kaine Paulsen|his father's]] vessel. An [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Star Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] inspects that ''Seldom Different'', and an impulsive [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] shoots and injures Drake for back talk. The ship is let go, and Drake recovers. The run is considered his coming of age.
